meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Code Errors
content.seo_description: Master AI-driven debugging to crush production bugs instantly. An advanced guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors manually. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based patching, you transform debugging from a bottleneck into a competitive advantage. This systematic approach allows you to isolate logic flaws, apply high-fidelity fixes, and maintain client velocity without compromising on code quality.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red error logs. You are staring at a production bug that defies logic, and every minute spent digging through stack traces is a minute you aren't shipping. This isn't just about fixing code; it's about protecting your reputation and your profit margins as a high-velocity developer.

We are moving beyond basic LLM chat interfaces. To thrive, you must adopt an agentic workflow that treats your codebase as a living, breathing entity. By leveraging the precision of Antigravity and the deep context awareness of Claude Code, you can turn 'unsolvable' bugs into solved tickets in mere minutes.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before patching, isolate the failure point by generating a comprehensive dependency map to ensure the bug isn't a side effect of a distant module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current execution flow and map dependencies for the failing function. Identify potential state mutations causing the instability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/services/auth.ts --query 'Find the root cause of the null reference exception in this module.'

steps.title: Simulate State Transitions
steps.description: Use AI to simulate the state machine leading up to the crash, ensuring you catch edge cases that manual testing misses.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Simulate the state transitions for the user object leading up to the error. Provide a sequence diagram of the failed execution path.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test-file ./tests/auth.test.ts --debug --instruction 'Identify the exact state mismatch occurring during the login flow.'

steps.title: Generate Minimal Reproducible Patches
steps.description: Draft a surgical fix that addresses the root cause without introducing regression, keeping the diff as small as possible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a minimal code change to handle the identified null pointer exception. Prioritize defensive programming patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file ./src/services/auth.ts --edit 'Apply defensive check for user object nullability before property access.'

steps.title: Automated Regression Verification
steps.description: Run an automated check to ensure your fix doesn't break existing business logic in related modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify if the proposed fix impacts related API endpoints or downstream services. Run a dependency impact analysis.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test --all --report-format detailed --instruction 'Ensure no regressions introduced in user-auth flow.'

steps.title: Final Architectural Audit
steps.description: Perform a final scan to ensure the codebase remains clean, maintainable, and follows best practices after the hotfix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the recent changes for code smell and performance overhead. Ensure the fix aligns with the existing project architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'Hotfix: Resolved null pointer in auth flow using defensive state checks.'

pro_tips: Always provide the package.json and relevant interface definitions to Claude Code before asking for fixes to minimize hallucinated types.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' comments for technical debt accrued during hotfixes so you can bill for refactoring later.
Configure your .claudeignore file to exclude build artifacts; this drastically speeds up the AI's context-gathering phase.
When debugging async race conditions, ask the AI to specifically trace the Event Loop order rather than just scanning syntax.
Keep a 'Debug Log' markdown file updated by Claude Code to provide clients with a professional summary of issues resolved during your sprint.
content.next_steps: Implement a standardized debugging workflow in your CI/CD pipeline to automate the initial analysis phase for every failed build.
content.conversion_block: Stop losing hours to trial-and-error debugging and start shipping with the confidence of a lead architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
